blocks.text: Opening a running thread for the {{fact:f:E-2021-001.client}} work so we have one place to track it and the record stays in order. We are a few weeks in and about where I expected: the fact base is assembled and I am most of the way through verifying it against the source documents your team sent over, the audience map is drafted, and Nancy Suarez has a first cut of the holding lines in hand.

Two things would help before we go further. First, could you confirm who on your side has final sign-off on external language, so we route approvals to the right person the first time? Second, there is one gap in the timeline I could not close from the documents alone; I will send the specific question separately today, and a quick answer will let us lock the holding statement.

Once the holding lines are settled, Nancy Suarez and I would like thirty minutes with you to walk the audience map before anything is circulated. Send a couple of windows that work on your side this week and I will set it up.
